# Shahab Gohar, AI Automation Engineer

> Personal services site of Shahab Gohar: AI automation, CRM integration (SuiteCRM, Mautic), and custom software for small and mid-size businesses. Every project starts with a fixed written quote and a working demo in 14 days, or the client doesn't pay.

## Pages

- [Home](https://shahabgohar.dev/): services, process, pricing, and client reviews
- [Services](https://shahabgohar.dev/services/): all service lines in one place
- [AI development](https://shahabgohar.dev/services/ai-development/): RAG systems, LLM apps, AI agents, and AI features for existing products
- [SuiteCRM development](https://shahabgohar.dev/services/suitecrm-development/): custom modules, plugins, workflows, and SuiteCRM 8 Angular work
- [Mautic and SuiteCRM integration](https://shahabgohar.dev/services/mautic-suitecrm-integration/): automated, de-duplicated lead sync
- [Salesforce to SuiteCRM migration](https://shahabgohar.dev/services/salesforce-to-suitecrm-migration/): records, custom objects, and automations rebuilt natively
- [Projects](https://shahabgohar.dev/projects/): case studies with measured results
- [Blog](https://shahabgohar.dev/blogs/): SuiteCRM and AI engineering write-ups
- [Automation audit checklist](https://shahabgohar.dev/automation-audit/): 12 manual processes with yearly costs and the build that removes each

## Facts

- Pricing: automation sprints from $1,900; custom builds from $6,500; CRM ownership retainers from $950/month
- Track record: 5.0 average rating across 35+ five-star client reviews, clients in 10 countries
- Products: AI Dashlet Generator and Business Card Reader, both published on the SuiteCRM Store
- Contact: shahab.developer.work@gmail.com
